core_capabilities: End-to-end SAP implementation (S/4HANA, ECC, Business One, RISE with SAP)
SAP Application Management Services (AMS) — production support, enhancement, monitoring
SAP upgrades and migrations (ECC to S/4HANA, on-prem to cloud, brownfield/greenfield)
SAP rollouts, integrations, and custom ABAP/Fiori development
target_audience: Mid-market and enterprise companies that run SAP (or are evaluating SAP), specifically heads of IT / CIOs / SAP CoE leads / Digital Transformation leaders at manufacturing, pharma, FMCG, retail, automotive, chemicals, and distribution companies. Typical trigger events: ECC end-of-life pressure (2027 deadline), recent SAP go-live, struggling AMS vendor, M&A integration, S/4HANA migration in-flight.
proof_points: SAP implementation and AMS partner across the full SAP stack (S/4HANA, ECC, BTP, SuccessFactors, Ariba)
Implementation partner experience across manufacturing, pharma, FMCG, automotive verticals
AMS coverage with defined SLAs for L1/L2/L3 production support
